$comment: C23 _BitInt wrap-aware const-fold in constant expressions (D-CSUBSET-BITINT-CONSTFOLD-LARGE, C4b). The FILE-SCOPE _Static_asserts are the corpus pins — each folds the bignum at the TRUE C23 UAC result width: `15wb+1==16` (int outranks _BitInt(5), NO wrap — the #1 trap), a narrow cast wrap `(_BitInt(4))15+1==0`, a signed wrap `(_BitInt(8))200==-56`, the M2 cast-then-shift `(u_BitInt(100))1<<99 == 2^99`, and a bit-precise `/`. main folds a const-expr _BitInt array DIMENSION (`(unsigned _BitInt(8))130-100 == 30`) and adds a narrow `12wb` -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: a wrong UAC width or a missing wrap turns one assert false and the TU fails to compile (no binary); the array-dim ICE fails S_NonConstantArrayLength if the bignum cast fold is disabled.
